entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
entries.value: "Pose-moi des questions avant de trop expliquer."

entries.source: "Check my answer before giving yours."
entries.value: "Vérifie ma réponse avant de donner la tienne."

entries.source: "Explain black holes simply"
entries.value: "Expliquer simplement les trous noirs"

entries.source: "Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "Donne-moi une version plus difficile après mon essai."

entries.source: "Help me understand photosynthesis"
entries.value: "Aide-moi à comprendre la photosynthèse"

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
entries.value: "Garde-le accessible aux débutants."

entries.source: "Teach me how interest works"
entries.value: "Apprends-moi comment fonctionnent les intérêts"

entries.source: "Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Utilise des exemples de mon examen, de mon projet ou de ma vie quotidienne."

entries.source: AI prompts
entries.value: Prompts IA

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: Version française : Ask for a tiny first task.

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: Terminez par un récapitulatif que vous écrivez vous-même.

entries.source: For Learn Anything, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Pour Learn Anything, une boucle d'entraînement utile est :

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Pour ce mode, la tâche est simple : posez n'importe quelle question et apprenez grâce à des explications claires, des exemples, des prompts de suivi et un tutorat IA patient.

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: Fondamentaux

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Les bons prompts incluent généralement trois éléments : le sujet, votre niveau actuel et le type d'aide souhaité. Vous n'avez pas besoin d'une formulation parfaite. Il vous faut seulement assez de contexte pour commencer la session.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Si la réponse semble trop large, resserrez-la. Demandez un exemple, une idée fausse, une question de vérification ou une prochaine étape. Si elle semble trop facile, demandez un défi. Si elle semble trop difficile, demandez un pont depuis ce que vous savez déjà.

entries.source: Learn Anything prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompts de Learn Anything et boucle d'étude

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: Rendre le résultat plus utile

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Learn Anything on inspir.
entries.value: Idées de prompts et boucle d’étude répétable pour obtenir des résultats d’apprentissage utiles avec Learn Anything sur inspir.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Reading an IA response is not the same as apprentissage. After the first réponse, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.

entries.source: Related learning paths
entries.value: Parcours d’apprentissage associés

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Demander retour on the part that felt uncertain.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Répondez avant de demander la solution.

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: Commencer par une demande claire

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: Énoncez l’objectif en une phrase.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: méthodes de travail

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the IA.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: The best learning sessions are adjustable. Instead of dropping a long réponse, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Learn Anything is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: The fastest way to get value from Learn Anything is to give the IA a learning job, not just a sujet. A sujet says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Ajoutez ensuite une contrainte qui rend la séance plus personnelle :

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
entries.value: Essayez l’un de ces points de départ :

entries.source: Turn the mode into practice
entries.value: Transformer le mode en pratique

entries.source: Use Learn Anything when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Viva Practice. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Utilisez Learn Anything lorsque c’est le bon mode pour la tâche. Si vous voulez un parcours associé, essayez Viva Practice. Vous pouvez aussi parcourir le blog d’apprentissage IA pour les méthodes d’étude, l’apprentissage socratique, les flashcards, le jeu de rôle et le rappel actif.
